name: Anthro pets | Buy, trade, sell, breed,
description:
Welcom to the new and improved freddy fazbear's pizza!

The basic premise:
You live in a world where instead of normal pets, there are anthro ones, and there's also people like you who make a living off of these pets, you sell, buy and trade them either to other pet breeder's who want a pet from you to resell or to breed, or to normal people who are just looking to buy themselvs or their family a pet.



The not so basic premise:
this one's gonne be long so grab some popcorn.
Firstly, you start your journey with 1000$ (you already have all the equipment needed to start your journey all you have to do is buy a pet). But sadly it's not all "sunshine and rainbows" since there's alot you need to know about the market, the pets themselvs, and what people look for or pay alot for so here's a kinda quick run down.
1st: rarity. Pretty simple, the rarer the pet the more people will pay for it, at the top of the charts you have pets like black panthers, amur leopard, and whatever else is rare, while at the bottom you have things such as domestic cats, dogs, and other things that are common. 2. character. Most people don't really want a pet that'd bite their head off do they? so a pet being friendly is another thing people look for, they also look for pets that are more tame and submissive. again pretty self explanatory since noone wants chaotic pets that'll constantly do whatever they want
3. Special traits. Just like in real life pets have different and sometimes rare mutations, like melanistic jaguars, spotless cheetahs, white lions you get the gist. People often look for those and are willing to pay top dollar for those (especially collectors)
4. Awards. Basically there are pet shows, like in real life, where if your pet wins awards, it'll be more valuable, and even other breeders might want to buy it for breeding purposes.Also that brings me to the next point.
If you have pets that you want to breed (ofcourse you need a male and a female) you can do that in what's called a "breeding area". Basically an isolated room where you leave the pets for a few days and hope for the best. You can resell the off-spring of those, or even keep it and use it to breed even better off-spring in the future.
Also as mentioned in the title, you can trade pets! you just message the owner of the pet you're interested in, and hopefully they'll accept the pet you want to offer them in return, then you pick out a place to finish the trade (and technically yes you can scam people but that's illegal in this universe so be careful)
